title: The Conglomerate Modpack
description:
A Minecraft [fabric-1.20.1] mod-pack for The Conglomerate Discord server!

This mod-pack includes many widely used optimizations to enhance how the game runs along with mods to improve upon minecraft's gameplay loop, such as the Create mod!
body:
### **Welcome to The Conglomerate Modpack.**

This pack features a large amount of optimisations to help people with a less-than potato PC/laptop run the game as smoothly as anyone else.

Alongside that, the pack features a suite of mods hand-picked by The Conglomerate discord server to improve upon the gaming experience in user and vanilla friendly ways, while still adding many new fun mechanics, like better terrain generation with Terralith and a slurry of automation with Create and its addons!

_If you'd like to join the discord server to have some fun with us or ask any questions, you can join [here](https://discord.gg/FRGFqpggxq)_
